name: Smithery
description: Marketplace for discovering and deploying MCP servers with one-click hosting; 5,000+ servers indexed.

seo.title: Smithery — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Smithery: Marketplace for discovering and deploying MCP servers with one-click hosting; 5,000+ servers indexed.

when_to_use: Discovering and deploying MCP servers for AI agent tool use
Connecting AI agents to real-world APIs via a managed MCP registry
Running tool integrations for Claude, GPT, and open LLMs
Sharing and installing community MCP servers for agent workflows

cons: MCP ecosystem quality is highly uneven
review.verdict: The default MCP registry today — useful for discovery but treat hosted servers like any third-party dependency.
review.best_for: Claude and MCP client users who want to browse and install servers fast
review.not_for: Teams with strict supply-chain review who need to audit each MCP server themselves
